notifications.message: Update on "Deep pothole on 80 Feet Road": Status changed to IN PROGRESS
Update on "Deep pothole on 80 Feet Road": Status changed to IN PROGRESS
Update on "Deep pothole on 80 Feet Road": Status changed to IN PROGRESS
Update on "Entire street dark - 5 lights out": Status changed to VALIDATED
Update on "Deep pothole on 80 Feet Road": Status changed to IN PROGRESS
Update on "Deep pothole on 80 Feet Road": Status changed to IN PROGRESS

issues.title: Deep pothole on 80 Feet Road
issues.description: A dangerous pothole approximately 2 feet wide and 8 inches deep has formed on 80 Feet Road near the Koramangala water tank junction. Multiple vehicles have been damaged. The pothole fills with water during rain making it invisible to drivers.

timeline.note: Saw a bike skid here yesterday

issues.title: Major water pipeline burst on 12th Main
issues.description: A major water pipeline has burst near 12th Main Road, Indiranagar. Water is gushing out and flooding the road. The leak has been ongoing for 2 days with no response from BWSSB. Nearby houses are facing water shortage.

issues.title: Garbage dumping near park entrance
issues.description: Illegal garbage dumping has been happening near the entrance of Jayanagar 4th Block Park. Plastic waste, food scraps, and construction debris piled up. Strong foul smell. Stray dogs gathering in the area creating nuisance.

issues.title: Entire street dark - 5 lights out
issues.description: Five consecutive streetlights on ITPL Main Road near Whitefield are completely non-functional. The stretch is extremely dark and dangerous at night. There have been reports of chain snatching in this area.

timeline.note: Yes, very scary to walk here at night

issues.title: Series of potholes on HSR 27th Main
issues.description: Multiple potholes have formed on 27th Main Road, HSR Layout Sector 1. At least 4 large potholes within a 200m stretch. The road was recently dug up for cable laying and never properly restored.

timeline.note: My car tire got damaged here

issues.title: Cracked footpath near bus stop
issues.description: The footpath near Malleshwaram Circle bus stop has severely cracked and is partially caved in. Pedestrians especially elderly people are at risk. Steel rebar is exposed creating a tripping hazard.

issues.title: Construction debris blocking drain
issues.description: Construction debris from a nearby building site has been dumped into the storm water drain on 5th Cross, Koramangala. The drain is completely blocked. With monsoon approaching this could cause severe flooding.

issues.title: Sewage overflow on residential street
issues.description: Sewage is overflowing from a manhole on 3rd Main Road, HSR Layout Sector 2. The entire street is flooded with sewage water. Residents are unable to step out of their homes. Severe health hazard.

issues.title: Crater-sized pothole on service road
issues.description: A massive pothole has formed on the Outer Ring Road service road near Marathahalli. The pothole is over 3 feet wide and a foot deep. Already caused two accidents this week.

issues.title: Flickering streetlight creating hazard
issues.description: A streetlight on Church Street, Indiranagar is rapidly flickering on and off causing disorientation to drivers. The strobe-like effect is dangerous for those with photosensitive conditions.

timeline.note: Can confirm, very distracting while driving

issues.title: Overflowing garbage bin at market
issues.description: The community garbage bin outside KR Market junction has been overflowing for a week. Garbage is spread across the sidewalk. Food waste is attracting rats and stray animals.

issues.title: Broken boundary wall leaning on road
issues.description: The boundary wall of an abandoned property on CMH Road is severely leaning towards the road. Large cracks visible. Could collapse any time especially during rain or wind.

issues.title: Road cave-in near metro construction
issues.description: The road has partially caved in near the Jayanagar Metro station construction site. A 4-foot wide sinkhole has appeared. Metal barriers have been placed but are inadequate.

issues.title: Tap water running brown/muddy
issues.description: Residents on 17th Cross, Malleshwaram have been receiving brown colored water from taps for 3 days. Water smells of mud and is not safe for consumption. BWSSB not responding to complaints.

timeline.note: Same issue at my house too

issues.title: Fallen electric pole after storm
issues.description: An electric pole has fallen after last night's thunderstorm on 100 Feet Road, Koramangala. Live wires are dangling close to the ground. Area cordoned off by residents using makeshift barriers.

issues.title: Plastic waste choking lake inlet
issues.description: Massive amounts of plastic waste have accumulated at the inlet of Agara Lake. The inlet pipe is almost completely blocked. This is causing water stagnation and killing aquatic life.

issues.title: Bridge railing missing section
issues.description: A 10-foot section of the bridge railing on Koramangala inner ring road overpass is completely missing. No warning signs placed. Extremely dangerous for two-wheelers and pedestrians.

issues.title: Waterlogged road impossible to pass
issues.description: The road near Sony Signal, Jayanagar is perpetually waterlogged due to blocked drainage. Vehicles get stuck daily. Auto-rickshaws refuse to go through this route.

issues.title: Illegal parking blocking ambulance route
issues.description: Cars are illegally parked on both sides of the road near Whitefield hospital, reducing it to single lane. Ambulances unable to pass during emergencies. Despite no-parking signs, enforcement is absent.

issues.title: Overflowing manhole during rain
issues.description: The manhole cover on 3rd Cross, Koramangala overflows every time it rains. Dirty water enters ground floor houses. The manhole cover is also partially broken and a tripping hazard.

timeline.note: My house got flooded last rain

issues.title: Sparking transformer box
issues.description: An electrical transformer box near Indiranagar BDA Complex is sparking intermittently. Burning smell noticed by passersby. Potential fire hazard.

issues.title: Dead animal carcass on roadside
issues.description: A dead stray dog carcass has been lying on the roadside near HSR Layout Sector 4 park for 3 days. BBMP has not removed it despite multiple calls. Health hazard to children playing in the park.

issues.title: Collapsed compound wall after rain
issues.description: A compound wall of a residential building on 7th Main, Jayanagar collapsed during heavy rain last night. Debris is blocking half the road. No injuries reported but road is partially blocked.

issues.title: Overhanging tree branch on power line
issues.description: A large tree branch is resting on a high-tension power line on Sampige Road, Malleshwaram. Risk of power line snapping or fire. BESCOM needs to coordinate with BBMP for trimming.

timeline.note: Tree on power line - fire risk!

issues.title: Road surface peeling off in patches
issues.description: The newly laid road on Lavelle Road, Indiranagar has started peeling off in large patches just 2 months after resurfacing. Clearly substandard material was used. Tax money wasted.

issues.title: Deep pothole on 80 Feet Road
issues.description: A dangerous pothole approximately 2 feet wide and 8 inches deep has formed on 80 Feet Road near the Koramangala water tank junction. Multiple vehicles have been damaged. The pothole fills with water during rain making it invisible to drivers.

issues.description: Five consecutive streetlights on ITPL Main Road near Whitefield are completely non-functional. The stretch is extremely dark and dangerous at night. There have been reports of chain snatching in this area.

timeline.note: Yes, very scary to walk here at night

quests.title: The Pothole Slayer
quests.description: Report 5 road damage issues to earn the Pothole Slayer badge

quests.title: Water Guardian
quests.description: Validate 3 water-related issues to become a Water Guardian

quests.title: Night Watch
quests.description: Report 3 issues after 8 PM to earn the Night Watch badge

quests.title: First Responder
quests.description: Be the first to validate 5 newly reported issues

quests.title: Community Raid Boss
quests.description: Get 10+ citizens to validate a single critical issue you reported

quests.title: The Clean Crusader
quests.description: Report 3 garbage/waste issues to earn the Clean Crusader badge

quests.title: Streak Master
quests.description: Report at least 1 issue every day for 7 consecutive days

achievements.title: Rally Master
achievements.description: Get 5+ validators on a single issue
